name: Lightspeed Commerce API
what_it_does: Lightspeed Commerce REST API for omnichannel point-of-sale and retail management platform. Enables AI agents to query sales transactions, retrieve inventory levels, access customer purchase history, manage product catalogs, and integrate retail operations data into analytics and fulfillment workflows. Lightspeed covers Retail, Restaurant, and Ecommerce verticals.
use_cases: Querying sales transactions and revenue data from retail analytics agents
Retrieving inventory levels and reorder alerts from inventory management agents
Accessing customer purchase history from CRM enrichment and loyalty agents
Integrating Lightspeed retail data into accounting and ERP workflow agents
not_for: Large enterprise retail without Lightspeed deployment
High-frequency trading or financial market data
best_when: A retail or restaurant business using Lightspeed wants AI agents to surface sales insights, monitor inventory, and integrate POS data into operations, accounting, and customer engagement workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: POS data includes transaction and payment information. PRIVACY: Customer purchase history is personal data. PCI DSS compliance required.

auth.notes: Lightspeed OAuth 2.0. Developer portal for app registration. Scopes control access to Retail, Restaurant, and Ecommerce APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Lightspeed subscription required; developer sandbox available
pricing.paid_tiers: Lightspeed Retail, Restaurant, Ecommerce plans; per location pricing
pricing.notes: Per-location SaaS pricing. Developer sandbox available for testing. API access included with subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Lightspeed API: rate limits per OAuth token; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: POS transaction data — unauthorized access affects business operations
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Lightspeed has separate APIs for Retail, Restaurant, and Ecommerce — different base URLs
Developer sandbox available but separate from production — test thoroughly before production
PCI DSS compliance required as payment card data flows through Lightspeed
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK + PRIVACY: POS transaction data and customer purchase history. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GDPR. EU and CA data residency. OAuth2 with scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: POS transaction and customer purchase data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GDPR. EU/CA data residency. OAuth2 scopes.
